description: Customer segmentation summary generated using KMeans clustering with automatic segment naming.

cluster_id.description: Internal cluster identifier (no inherent business meaning).

avg_age.description: Average age of customers in the cluster.

avg_purchase_frequency.description: Average purchase frequency for customers in the cluster.

avg_purchase_amount.description: Average purchase amount (or total purchase amount feature) for customers in the cluster.

promo_usage_rate.description: Proportion of customers who used promotions (0 to 1).

avg_satisfaction.description: Average satisfaction score for customers in the cluster.

customer_count.description: Number of customers in the cluster.

segment_name.description: Business-friendly name assigned based on cluster behavior (e.g., Frequent Buyers, High-Spending Customers).
